text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The night after the race, I spot Grass Wonder all
by herself on the track.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, the shame... How could I let this happen?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The top is nothing but a distant dream if I can't
even handle this much of a load.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I will need to work much, much harder if I am to
live up to my own standards, let alone prevail
over others...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's clearly at her wit's end. It might be a good
idea to reconsider her schedule.
